The Santa Barbara County Public Health Department is opening more COVID-19 vaccine appointments
tomorrow. The county is expecting 3,800 doses of the Johnson & Johnson vaccine this week.
Emergency services, agriculture and food service workers are eligible to get the vaccine. Community
members can book an appointment starting at 9 a.m. tomorrow on the health department's
